title: The Armed Forces (Punjab and Chandigarh) Special Powers Act, 1983
full_text: The Armed Forces (Punjab and Chandigarh) Special Powers Act, 1983 सशस्‍त्र बल (पंजाब और चंडीगढ़) विशेष शक्‍तियां अधिनियम, 1983 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198334 Act Number: 34 Enactment Date: 1983-12-08 Act Year: 1983 Short Title: The Armed Forces (Punjab and Chandigarh) Special Powers Act, 1983 Hindi Title: सशस्‍त्र बल (पंजाब और चंडीगढ़) विशेष शक्‍तियां अधिनियम, 1983 Long Title: An Act to enable certain special powers to be conferred upon members of the armed forces in the disturbed areas in the State of Punjab and the Union territory of Chandigarh. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 15-10-1983 Last Updated: 08-04-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Armed Forces (Punjab and Chandigarh) Special Powers Act, 1983 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power to declare areas to be disturbed areas. Section 4. Special powers of the armed forces. Section 5. Power of search to include powers to break open locks, etc. Section 6. Arrested person and seized property to be made over to the police. Section 7. Protection of persons acting in good faith under this Act. Section 8. Repeal and saving.
